publisherId.description: PubMatic-specific identifier associated with your account

adSlot.description: PubMatic-specific identifier associated with this ad unit. Refers to Ad Tags within PubMatic UI. We accept Ad Tag Name or Ad Tag ID, refer to example.

dctr.description:
Deal Custom Targeting
(Value configured in each adunit will be passed inside adunit configs i.e., imp.ext)

deals.description:
PMP deals
(Passed per slot. Each deal-id should be a string with more than 3 characters.)

outstreamAU.description: Renderer ID provided by your account representative. Required for outstream video bids unless the ad unit has a [supplied renderer](https://docs.prebid.org/dev-docs/show-outstream-video-ads.html#renderers).
